phase_name: Adaptive Onboarding Baseline and Resume Flow

completed_tasks.name: Re-diagnose invalid Phase 5 planning attempt and identify checker blockers
Discover valid GSD plan schema from prior phases
Rewrite Phase 5 plan 05-01 as valid Wave 0 foundation plan
Gather phase-specific inputs for rewrite of remaining plans
Rewrite remaining valid Phase 5 plans and rerun verification
completed_tasks.progress: 05-01-PLAN.md was rewritten into valid GSD schema with Wave 0 shadcn + Onboarding.test.tsx foundation. 05-02-PLAN.md and 05-03-PLAN.md still contain the older invalid schema and must be replaced. Verification has not been rerun after the rewrite.

remaining_tasks.name: Rewrite backend execution plan(s) for multi-round onboarding status, sequential gating, profile updates, and recommendation contract
Rewrite frontend execution plan(s) for auth entry routing, onboarding container/components/hooks, and confirm flow using learningPathId
Run plan-checker and iterate until Phase 5 plans pass or blockers are explicitly resolved

blockers.description: Current 05-02-PLAN.md and 05-03-PLAN.md still use invalid schema (missing phase/type/must_haves frontmatter and XML <task> structure) and will fail the checker until rewritten.
blockers.workaround: Replace them completely using 04-01/04-02/04-03 plan schema as the template before rerunning verification.

blockers.description: Phase 5 checker previously reported missing ONB-04 entry-flow coverage from Login/AuthCallback/authStore and broken recommendation->confirm contract using slug instead of learningPathId.
blockers.workaround: Ensure rewritten plans explicitly cover Login.tsx, AuthCallback.tsx, authStore.ts, backend recommendation payload, and confirm flow with learningPathId.

decisions.decision: Discard the earlier Phase 5 freeform plans and re-author them in the exact GSD schema used by valid Phase 4 plans.
decisions.rationale: The checker blocked all previous plans for schema non-compliance, missing XML tasks, missing structured must_haves, and Nyquist verification gaps.

decisions.decision: Introduce a dedicated Wave 0 plan for UI primitives and frontend onboarding tests.
decisions.rationale: 05-UI-SPEC and 05-VALIDATION explicitly require shadcn initialization and frontend/src/pages/Onboarding.test.tsx before later Phase 5 UI work.

decisions.decision: Treat auth entry routing and recommendation confirm contract as first-class planning scope, not implementation notes.
decisions.rationale: The checker flagged ONB-04 as not covered end-to-end and D-17 as violated when confirm used slug instead of learningPathId.

next_action: Rewrite 05-02-PLAN.md into valid GSD schema first, covering backend multi-round onboarding status/questions/submission/profile/recommendation-learningPathId contract; then rewrite 05-03-PLAN.md for auth-entry + frontend container flow; then rerun gsd-plan-checker.
context_notes: The core insight is that the previous planning work failed mostly because of schema mismatch with GSD, not because the phase understanding was wrong. 05-01 has now been re-authored correctly as a Wave 0 foundation plan. The remaining work is to rewrite the rest in the same exact schema, keep scopes smaller, add task-level automated verification, and ensure ONB-04 + D-17 are explicitly covered end-to-end. Avoid resuming the old freeform plan style. Use 04-01/04-02/04-03 as the structural template and keep each plan narrow enough for checker acceptance.
